prompt: A field must store one value chosen from a fixed set of options presented as a dropdown. Which field type is appropriate?
choices: Choice field with defined choice list values
Journal Input field
Duration field
Attachment field
explanation: A Choice field presents a dropdown of predefined values, ideal for selecting one option from a fixed set.

prompt: What is the effect of the Auto-number configuration on a table?
choices: Each new record receives a sequential, prefixed identifier automatically
Records are deleted automatically after numbering
The table becomes read-only for all users
Fields are renamed to numeric labels
explanation: Auto-number assigns each new record a sequential number with a configured prefix and starting value.

prompt: When designing the data model, why might you choose a Many-to-Many relationship table rather than a single reference field?
choices: Because each record on both tables can relate to multiple records on the other table
Because reference fields cannot store any value
Because it prevents users from opening the form
Because it converts the table to global scope
explanation: A Many-to-Many relationship uses an intermediary table so records on each side can associate with many records on the other side.

prompt: What does setting a field as Mandatory in the dictionary enforce?
choices: The record cannot be saved until the field contains a value
The field is hidden on every form
The field value is encrypted at rest
The field is copied to all related tables
explanation: A mandatory dictionary attribute requires a value before the record can be inserted or updated.

prompt: Which tool provides a guided environment for building scoped applications, including tables, forms, and business logic in one place?
choices: App Engine Studio / Studio IDE
The email client
The Discovery schedule editor
The MID Server dashboard
explanation: Studio (and App Engine Studio) is the integrated development environment for building and organizing all files of a scoped application.
